010 *

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.*;
021
022/**
023 * A pairing of a {@link RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer} and {@link RdfXmlParser} into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
024 *
025 * <p>
026 *    The general idea is to combine a single serializer and parser inside a simplified API for serializing and parsing POJOs.
027 *
028 * <h5 class='figure'>Examples:</h5>
029 * <p class='bjava'>
030 *    <jc>// Using instance.</jc>
031 *    RdfXmlAbbrev <jv>rdfXmlAbbrev</jv> = <jk>new</jk> RdfXmlAbbrev();
032 *    MyPojo <jv>myPojo</jv> = <jv>rdfXmlAbbrev</jv>.to(<jv>string</jv>, MyPojo.<jk>class</jk>);
033 *    String <jv>string</jv> = <jv>rdfXmlAbbrev</jv>.of(<jv>myPojo</jv>);
034 * </p>
035 * <p class='bjava'>
036 * <jc>// Using DEFAULT instance.</jc>
037 *    MyPojo <jv>myPojo</jv> = RdfXmlAbbrev.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.to(<jv>string</jv>, MyPojo.<jk>class</jk>);
038 *    String <jv>string</jv> = RdfXmlAbbrev.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.of(<jv>myPojo</jv>);
039 * </p>
040 *
041 * <h5 class='figure'>Example output (bean with name/age, abbreviated RDF/XML):</h5>
042 * <p class='bxml'>
043 *    <xt>&lt;rdf:RDF&gt;</xt>
044 *       <xt>&lt;j:Person rdf:about=</xt><xs>"..."</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>
045 *          <xt>&lt;j:name&gt;</xt>Alice<xt>&lt;/j:name&gt;</xt>
046 *          <xt>&lt;j:age&gt;</xt>30<xt>&lt;/j:age&gt;</xt>
047 *       <xt>&lt;/j:Person&gt;</xt>
048 *    <xt>&lt;/rdf:RDF&gt;</xt>
049 * </p>
050 *
051 * <h5 class='figure'>Complex (nested address + array):</h5>
052 * <p class='bxml'>
053 *    <xt>&lt;rdf:RDF&gt;</xt>
054 *       <xt>&lt;j:Person rdf:about=</xt><xs>"..."</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>
055 *          <xt>&lt;j:name&gt;</xt>Alice<xt>&lt;/j:name&gt;</xt>
056 *          <xt>&lt;j:age&gt;</xt>30<xt>&lt;/j:age&gt;</xt>
057 *          <xt>&lt;j:address rdf:resource=</xt><xs>".../address"</xs><xt>/&gt;</xt>
058 *       <xt>&lt;/j:Person&gt;</xt>
059 *       <xt>&lt;j:Address rdf:about=</xt><xs>".../address"</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>
060 *          <xt>&lt;j:street&gt;</xt>123 Main St<xt>&lt;/j:street&gt;</xt>
061 *          <xt>&lt;j:city&gt;</xt>Boston<xt>&lt;/j:city&gt;</xt>
062 *          <xt>&lt;j:state&gt;</xt>MA<xt>&lt;/j:state&gt;</xt>
063 *       <xt>&lt;/j:Address&gt;</xt>
064 *    <xt>&lt;/rdf:RDF&gt;</xt>
065 * </p>
066 *
067 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
068 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
069 *    <li class='link'>{doc jm.Marshallers}
070 * </ul>
071 */
072public class RdfXmlAbbrev extends CharMarshaller {
073
074   /**
075    * Default reusable instance.
076    */
077   public static final RdfXmlAbbrev DEFAULT = new RdfXmlAbbrev();
078
079   /**
080    * Constructor.
081    *
082    * <p>
083    * Uses {@link RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer#DEFAULT} and {@link RdfXmlParser#DEFAULT}.
084    */
085   public RdfXmlAbbrev() {
086      this(RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer.DEFAULT, RdfXmlParser.DEFAULT);
087   }
088
089   /**
090    * Constructor.
091    *
092    * @param s
093    *    The serializer to use for serializing output.
094    *    <br>Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
095    * @param p
096    *    The parser to use for parsing input.
097    *    <br>Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
098    */
099   public RdfXmlAbbrev(RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer s, RdfXmlParser p) {
100      super(s, p);
101   }
102}
